summary: Gruber announces the live episode of The Talk Show recorded at WWDC 2022, featuring Apple executives Craig Federighi and Greg Joswiak as guests. The episode was filmed at the new Apple Developer Center at Apple Park in front of a live audience. He highlights that this is the first episode mastered and available in 4K, produced by Sandwich video production company. The post is essentially a promotional announcement rather than an analytical piece.
key_points: Craig Federighi and Greg Joswiak appeared as guests to discuss WWDC 2022 news
The show was recorded live at the new Apple Developer Center at Apple Park
This was the first episode of The Talk Show mastered and available in 4K
Sandwich video production company handled the video production
money_quotes: Watch it on the biggest screen you can — this is the first time the show was mastered and available in 4K.
My sincere thanks to everyone at Apple who helped make this happen.
key_insight: The Talk Show's live WWDC episode with Apple's top software and marketing executives represents the show's continued evolution as a premier venue for Apple to discuss its announcements directly.
